entries.value: ഈ പൊതു വിശദീകരണം of why inspir exists കൂടാതെ why പഠന access matters.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു മോഡുകൾ are രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്തത് around പഠന behavior: സൂചനകൾ, Socratic ചോദ്യങ്ങൾ, ഘട്ടം checks, quizzes, flashcards, എഴുത്ത് ഫീഡ്ബാക്ക്, റിവ്യൂ ലൂപ്പ്s, കൂടാതെ സജീവ വിശദീകരണം.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു product gives anyone a place start while സ്കൂൾ കൂടാതെ partner deployments കഴിയും adapt ഈ experience ക്കായി local needs.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു product is easy try first, while സ്കൂളുകൾ കൂടാതെ partners കഴിയും explore tailored deployments ക്കായി community needs.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു product keeps പഠന easy try, while സ്കൂളുകൾ കൂടാതെ CSR partners കഴിയും support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ funded access.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു product stays easy try: പഠിതാക്കൾ കഴിയും land directly on a പഠന മോഡ് കൂടാതെ begin as a അതിഥി. സ്കൂളുകൾ കൂടാതെ CSR partners കഴിയും support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ subsidised access.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു product, ഈ സ്കൂൾ pathway, കൂടാതെ ഈ content ലൈബ്രറി should all point back ഈ same principle: പഠന should stay സജീവ, accessible, കൂടാതെ useful.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: ഈ പൊതു statement of why inspir exists കൂടാതെ എന്ത് പഠന access means.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: ഈ സ്കൂൾ pathway ക്കായി tailored AI പഠന spaces കൂടാതെ funded access.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: ഈ story നിന്ന് quizzes കൂടാതെ student communities സൗജന്യ AI പഠന tools നിർമ്മിച്ചത് in പൊതു.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: ഈ story spans quizzes, offline സ്കൂൾ networks, curriculum ingestion, കൂടാതെ പൊതു AI പഠന മോഡുകൾ.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: ഈ strongest angle is സൗജന്യ പൊതു AI പഠന that opens directly in അതിഥി മോഡ് കൂടാതെ keeps പഠിതാക്കൾ സജീവ through മോഡ്-വിശിഷ്ട teaching rather than സാധാരണ ഉത്തരം generation.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: ഈ wider international buildout connected ഈ inspir പ്രോജക്റ്റ്.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: ഈ written പഠന ലൈബ്രറി that supports പ്രോംപ്റ്റുകൾ, study loops, കൂടാതെ ആഴത്തിലുള്ള പരിശീലനം.

entries.source: Trust and privacy boundaries
entries.value: Trust കൂടാതെ സ്വകാര്യത boundaries

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Trust കൂടാതെ safety

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Try പൊതു അതിഥി മോഡുകൾ

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: മനസ്സിലാക്കൽ over answers

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike a സാധാരണ chatbot, inspir organizes AI around പഠന മോഡുകൾ അതുകൊണ്ട് പഠിതാക്കൾ കഴിയും start കൂടെ ഈ kind of help they need: സൂചനകൾ, ചോദ്യങ്ങൾ, quizzes, സജീവ recall, roleplay, debate, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ഫീഡ്ബാക്ക്.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: ഉപയോഗിക്കുക https://inspirlearning.com ക്കായി ഈ site, /mission ക്കായി ഈ mission, /topics ക്കായി ഈ പൊതു പഠന മോഡ് ഡയറക്ടറി, കൂടാതെ /chat/learn-anything ക്കായി ഈ default അതിഥി പഠന experience.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools people can try immediately.
entries.value: ഉപയോഗിക്കുക this when describing ഈ full set of guest-mode പഠന tools people കഴിയും try immediately.

entries.value: ഉപയോഗിക്കുക this when introducing inspir as ഈ main product അല്ലെങ്കിൽ linking നിന്ന് a ഡയറക്ടറി, profile, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ലേഖനം.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: അതെ. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from simple /chat/{topicSlug} links.
entries.value: അതെ. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from simple /chat/{topicSlug} links.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: അതെ. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: അതെ. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.

entries.source: These pages make the story easier to verify, cite, share, and use: public modes, learning paths, long-form guides, school deployment notes, media facts, and the company background.
entries.value: ഈ പേജുകൾ കഥ പരിശോധിക്കാനും ഉദ്ധരിക്കാനും പങ്കിടാനും ഉപയോഗിക്കാനും എളുപ്പമാക്കുന്നു: പൊതു മോഡുകൾ, പഠന പാതകൾ, ദീർഘരൂപ ഗൈഡുകൾ, സ്കൂൾ നടപ്പാക്കൽ കുറിപ്പുകൾ, മാധ്യമ വിവരങ്ങൾ, കമ്പനിയുടെ പശ്ചാത്തലം.
